name: Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and shortening; cut in the shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. Add the cheese and milk, stirring until the dry ingredients are moistened.
3. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface, and knead lightly 4 or 5 times.
4. Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
5. Cut with a 2-inch biscuit cutter.
6. Place on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 450 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes.
Yield: about 1 dozen.
